Client Bible (Plug & Play)
Things to keep in mind:
It is very important to keep your clients informed and that they have an easy to use
platform they understand where they can see how their money is being spent or
geek out some of the data of their ads.
Having a client bible set up for your client betters your relationship with them, sets
you aside from the rest of agencies and shows that you care about them.
You need to fill this client bible daily, and spend a little bit more time once a week.
This shouldn’t take you/your contractor more than 10 minutes a day.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Set up:
We’ve created two different client bibles that apply to (almost) every niche, you are
always welcome to edit your client bible if you feel you have a specific need that isn’t
being covered.
For Lead Based results (e.g. Local businesses, realtors) click HERE
For Ecommerce/Info Product businesses click HERE
Go to File -> Make a Copy, save it in your google drive with the name of your client
followed by Client Bible.
Fill out the passwords sheet with all your clients information and assets like a google
drive with all the images that they have provided.
Fill out the funnel steps tab with all the links that correspond to your clients store. If
you have a lead based client you can add links if it is being done on clickfunnels, or
just add some notes if it is being done inside of Facebook.
The client bible is set up as October but you can easily change this by putting the
month you’re starting in and then clicking and dragging your mouse on the bottom
right corner to the right until the third cell.
As shown here:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Client Bible (Plug & Play)

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Client Bible (Plug & Play)
Daily workflow:
Every day you need to fill out the second tab of the client bible called ‘Daily metrics’
The metrics of the day pulled from Facebook, here is a Loom that explains how to
build this views on Facebook so it’s easy to fill out:
Click HERE to watch full tutorial.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Weekly workflow:
Each Monday you need to fill out the ‘A&R report’ in which you’ll write any and every
important change or trend that you’re seeing with the ad account. For instance, if
you found new winning audiences you can state it there, or if any ads were
disapproved it should also be there.
We do this to ease communication with our clients and also for them to know we are
working hard for them.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
